steps.title: Find the new scale factor
steps.content: The larger map has a side length $90\%$ longer than the original, so each side is $1.9$ times as long as before.

steps.title: Divide the represented distance
steps.content:
The same actual distance is spread across $1.9$ times as many inches, so the miles represented by $1$ inch are divided by $1.9$.
$$\frac{13}{1.9}=6.842105$$
This is closest to $6.84$. The answer is B.
